description: Unlock a world of exclusive features and benefits with our special annual app subscription offer! This vibrant, colourful email template is perfect for promoting your app services, showcasing the unique features of your app and highlighting the value of an annual plan. Whether you're offering a text app, chat service or any other software and technology product, this template is designed to boost your sales and service promotion efforts. The visually appealing layout is sure to catch your audience's attention and encourage them to take advantage of your special offer. Don't miss out on this opportunity to increase subscription rates and customer engagement.
short_description: Promote your app services with our colourful annual subscription offer email template. Ideal for showcasing software and technology products, this template aids in increasing sales and service promotions. Boost subscription rates and engage customers with this special offer.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
